---
title: "Giftie the Changeling"
---

## Giftie the Changeling

**Author:** Christabel Rose Coleridge
**Date:** 1869
**Imprint:** London: Warne

### Notes

This story first appeared in the <i>Barnacle</i> and was subsequently published by Warne in 1869 under the initials C. C.; it is not identified as her work in the British Library catalogue. The last extant volume of the <i>Barnacle</i> (Michaelmas 1867) has the beginning of the story.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
